peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 镍钴资源和正极材料一体化平台
dominance_test: Not a weaker copy of cathode or precursor peers because resource locking plus cathode and precursor customer contracts create a broader integration thesis.
moat_summary: Moat comes from Indonesian nickel resource projects; cobalt and nickel metallurgy; precursor and cathode production; global customer long orders; and a cross-border project execution system.
advantage_summary: Resource self-supply and customer contracts make the business harder to replicate than pure material capacity. The company also adds lithium-resource optionality through Arcadia.
weakness_summary: Metal price cycle; technology route shifts away from high-nickel ternary; high capex; and overseas project execution risk.
market_position_summary: 2025 disclosures and company coverage report record revenue RMB 81.019bn; net profit RMB 6.110bn; MHP shipment 236.5kt; nickel resource locked above 1.4bn wet tonnes; cathode and precursor long orders with LGES and EVE.
source_quality: Do you agree to retain 华友钴业 as a cross-resource and battery-material integration watch company rather than judging it as a pure miner?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 三元前驱体和镍资源一体化龙头
dominance_test: Not dominated by 华友 because 中伟's strongest thesis is global nickel and cobalt precursor scale plus materials platform execution.
moat_summary: Moat comes from global pCAM market position; high-nickel and ultra-high-nickel precursor capability; nickel resource locking; Indonesian nickel capacity; and broad material-system expansion.
advantage_summary: Global scale and customer qualification are difficult for capital alone to buy quickly. Resource and precursor integration supports cost and supply security.
weakness_summary: Margins are thinner than best specialty-material companies; balance sheet and capex need monitoring; ternary demand mix can be pressured by LFP.
market_position_summary: Public reports describe 中伟 as a global largest nickel and cobalt precursor producer; 2025 net profit RMB 1.567bn; trinary precursor capacity 299kt; and nickel resources locked above 600mn wet tonnes through stakes and long-term contracts.
source_backed_evidence: Annual-report coverage plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you want 中伟 retained beside 华友 because its pCAM market position is independently strong?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 电池回收和三元前驱体闭环平台
dominance_test: Not dominated by 中伟 if the accepted thesis is recycling network plus precursor customers rather than pCAM scale alone.
moat_summary: Moat comes from battery recycling network; precursor customers; recycled nickel cobalt lithium supply; and long operating history in urban mining.
advantage_summary: Recycling channels and compliant processing qualifications are slower to replicate than generic material capacity. The thesis is strongest if closed-loop resource recovery becomes material to cost and customer ESG value.
weakness_summary: Profitability is more cyclical and lower quality than the headline triage score suggests; recycling economics can depend on feedstock price and policy.
market_position_summary: Company site describes six battery recycling centers and partnerships with CATL LG Samsung and other customers. 2026Q1 report coverage says battery recycling volume grew 40% and high-end ternary cathode output grew 35%.
source_quality: Should 格林美 be retained for closed-loop recycling and precursor integration or rejected as weaker than 中伟 in precursor scale?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 电解液和核心锂盐一体化龙头
dominance_test: Not dominated by 新宙邦 because 天赐 has larger electrolyte and LiPF6 integration scale while 新宙邦's possible edge is specialty fluorochemicals.
moat_summary: Moat comes from electrolyte scale; LiPF6 and additives self-supply; process cost advantage; customer validation; and overseas localization.
advantage_summary: Capital can build electrolyte capacity but cannot easily replicate large-scale low-cost 6F integration; formulation know-how; customer qualification; and global supply reliability.
weakness_summary: Earnings are exposed to LiPF6 price cycles; electrolyte capacity can become oversupplied; margins can fall sharply in downcycles.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage reports electrolyte sales above 720kt and net profit up 181.43%. Reports also state 6F self-supply and lower-cost liquid LiPF6 process helped Q4 profitability.
source_backed_evidence: Company annual-report coverage plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you agree 天赐材料 should be retained as the electrolyte anchor despite LiPF6 cyclicality?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 电解液添加剂和含氟精细化学品平台
dominance_test: May be dominated by 天赐 in electrolyte scale but not necessarily in specialty additives and fluorochemical niches.
moat_summary: Moat may come from electrolyte additives; new electrolytes; organic fluorochemicals; capacitor chemicals; and specialty-material customer qualification.
advantage_summary: Specialty fluorochemicals and additives are more formula and process intensive than generic electrolyte blending.
weakness_summary: Lower triage score reflects that the current model underweights specialty chemistry. Need deeper evidence on customer stickiness; additive share; and margins by segment.
market_position_summary: Company official site describes battery chemicals; emerging electrolytes and auxiliary materials; lithium salts; solvents and additives; and organic fluorochemicals. 2025 half-year report provides segment and product descriptions.
source_backed_evidence: Company official source plus periodic report.
source_quality: Do you want to keep 新宙邦 as a differentiated specialty-chemistry peer beside 天赐 or reject it as lower-scale electrolyte exposure?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
dominance_test: Not dominated by other material companies because separator process scale and customer qualification form a distinct step-level moat.
moat_summary: Moat comes from wet-process separator capacity; cost curve; coating and base-film process control; global customer validation; and long-term overseas contracts.
advantage_summary: Separator has a meaningful process and yield barrier. Scale and customer qualification are hard for capital alone to compress quickly.
weakness_summary: Separator profitability is cyclical and was hurt by overcapacity. Need monitor price recovery and overseas plant execution.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage says 恩捷 has the world's largest wet separator capacity and supply capacity; 2025 global wet separator share above 35%; and a 2026-2030 U.S. long-term supply agreement for about 973mn square meters.
source_backed_evidence: Annual-report coverage plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you agree 恩捷股份 should be retained as the separator anchor?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 干法隔膜和湿法隔膜第二梯队平台
dominance_test: Could be dominated by 恩捷 in wet separator but may have a separate dry-separator position.
moat_summary: Moat may come from dry separator leadership; wet separator second-tier scale; and overseas customer qualification.
advantage_summary: Dry separator leadership can be differentiated if dry-process demand or storage batteries expand. It should not be rejected only because 恩捷 is stronger in wet process.
weakness_summary: Needs better evidence that dry separator economics and customer contracts are durable. Otherwise it is a smaller separator peer.
market_position_summary: Industry coverage reports 星源 wet separator share around second tier and dry separator share leading in 2025. Professional coverage estimates 2025 separator shipments around 5bn square meters and around 15% share.
source_backed_evidence: Professional research summaries and industry coverage.
source_quality: Should 星源材质 be retained as a dry-separator specialist or rejected because 恩捷 covers the separator attention slot?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 负极材料和涂覆隔膜平台
dominance_test: Not dominated by 贝特瑞 because 璞泰来's strongest thesis is coated separator plus anode plus PVDF and equipment integration rather than pure anode volume.
moat_summary: Moat comes from coated separator global share; anode process capability; PVDF; automation equipment; and battery-material platform integration.
advantage_summary: Coating process; customer co-development; and multi-step platform integration are harder to replicate than a single commodity material line.
weakness_summary: Needs monitor whether breadth dilutes focus and whether anode margin recovery is structural.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual-report coverage reports revenue RMB 15.711bn and net profit RMB 2.359bn. Research coverage says coated separator effective capacity 14bn square meters; shipment 10.942bn square meters; about 35.3% of global coated separator market; and 1792 patents by 2025 year end.
source_backed_evidence: Annual-report PDF plus professional research summaries.
source_quality: Do you agree 璞泰来 should be retained for coated separator and platform integration even if 贝特瑞 is the clearer anode leader?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
dominance_test: Not dominated by 璞泰来 or 尚太 because 贝特瑞 has the clearest global anode volume and silicon-anode technology evidence.
moat_summary: Moat comes from long-cycle anode process know-how; customer qualification; global anode shipment leadership; silicon-based anode commercialization; and global capacity layout.
advantage_summary: Anode capacity can be added with capital but high-quality graphite and silicon-carbon product validation takes time. Long-term leadership supports watchlist inclusion.
weakness_summary: Anode is competitive and margin can compress. Need monitor cost curve against 尚太 and capacity expansion discipline.
market_position_summary: 2025 reports show revenue RMB 16.983bn; net profit RMB 875mn; anode shipment above 600kt; global anode shipment leadership; and silicon-based anode standard and customer-recognized ton-level shipment evidence.
source_backed_evidence: Annual report coverage plus industry white-paper coverage.
source_quality: Do you agree 贝特瑞 should be retained as the anode anchor?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 人造石墨负极成本和产能平台
dominance_test: May be dominated by 贝特瑞 on technology breadth and by 璞泰来 on platform breadth unless cost leadership is strong enough.
moat_summary: Moat may come from integrated graphitization; cost control; rapid capacity release; and customer validation in artificial graphite.
advantage_summary: Cost curve and process control can be a valid moat in commoditizing anode materials if proven across cycles.
weakness_summary: Needs stronger evidence that the cost advantage is durable rather than a cycle and utilization effect. Technology breadth appears lower than 贝特瑞.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual report coverage says artificial graphite anode sales reached 343.5kt. 2025 performance coverage reports revenue RMB 7.943bn and net profit RMB 946mn.
source_backed_evidence: Annual-report coverage plus company filing mirror.
source_quality: Should 尚太科技 be retained as a cost-curve anode specialist or rejected because 贝特瑞 and 璞泰来 already cover the anode attention slots?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 负极材料和偏光片双主业平台
dominance_test: Currently dominated in battery-material attention by 贝特瑞 for anode leadership and by 璞泰来 for battery-material platform integration.
moat_summary: Moat in battery materials is not clear enough versus retained anode peers. Polarizer may be a separate display-material thesis.
advantage_summary: 负极 and polarizer dual leadership may be valuable but cross-industry breadth needs a separate display-materials review rather than automatic battery-material inclusion.
weakness_summary: Group restructuring and mixed business exposure complicate the company-level thesis. Need separate evidence before watchlist upgrade.
market_position_summary: 2025 coverage says the company has anode and polarizer dual main businesses and 2026Q1 profit rose sharply. This supports a reclassification question but not a clear battery-material watch decision yet.
source_quality: Do you want 杉杉股份 reclassified to display materials or kept out because anode is already covered by stronger peers?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 磷酸盐正极材料规模龙头
dominance_test: Not dominated by 德方纳米 because 湖南裕能 has stronger LFP scale and phosphorous resource integration evidence.
moat_summary: Moat comes from phosphorous cathode scale; customer validation; LFP process consistency; and upstream phosphorous resource and iron phosphate self-supply.
advantage_summary: Large-scale consistent LFP production and upstream resource linkage can create cost and supply advantages that capital cannot immediately replicate.
weakness_summary: LFP is more commoditized than high-end separator or specialty electrolyte. Need monitor margin durability and customer concentration.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual report says phosphorous cathode material sales were 1.1371mn tonnes; market share ranked first for six consecutive years; and Huangjiapo phosphate mine started output with iron phosphate fully self-supplied.
source_quality: Do you agree 湖南裕能 should be retained as the LFP cathode scale anchor?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 磷酸铁锂 and LMFP and lithium supplement technology specialist
dominance_test: May be dominated by 湖南裕能 in LFP scale but has possible differentiated technology in LMFP and lithium supplement additives.
moat_summary: Moat may come from nano-LFP process know-how; LMFP commercialization; high-density LFP generations; and lithium supplement enhancer customer designation.
advantage_summary: Technology optionality is meaningful and should not be rejected solely because current financials are weak.
weakness_summary: Business quality and cash flow were weak in 2025. The key question is whether products can regain durable margin rather than only volume.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual-report coverage says fourth-generation high-density LFP continued ramping; fifth-generation product industrialization accelerated; LMFP had batch vehicle application; and lithium supplement enhancer obtained customer exclusive designation and stable delivery.
source_quality: Should 德方纳米 be retained as a technology-optionality cathode specialist or rejected until margins and customer validation improve?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 高镍 and solid-state cathode specialist
dominance_test: Not dominated by 容百 if its solid-state material customer validation and central-SOE research platform are accepted as distinct.
moat_summary: Moat may come from high-nickel cathode know-how; solid-state cathode material development; customer validation with domestic and overseas battery makers; and multi-chemistry product coverage.
advantage_summary: High-end cathode formulation and customer validation create higher barriers than commodity cathode capacity.
weakness_summary: Ternary cathode demand can be pressured by LFP. Need verify whether solid-state material orders are material and repeatable.
market_position_summary: 2025 annual-report summary says revenue grew 36.63% and net profit grew 34.02%. It also reports all-solid-state high-nickel and lithium-rich manganese cathode materials achieved 20-ton-plus batch supply and several solid-state customers were introduced.
source_quality: Should 当升科技 be retained as the high-end and solid-state cathode watch case?

peer_group: 电池材料与镍钴资源一体化
archetype: 高镍正极和 cathode platform transition case
dominance_test: Potentially dominated by 当升 in solid-state material validation and by 华友 in integrated ternary cathode-resource ecosystem unless overseas high-nickel execution proves distinct.
moat_summary: Moat may come from high-nickel cathode technology; overseas Korean capacity; LMFP; sodium materials; and cathode-platform expansion.
advantage_summary: The company should not be rejected only because 2025 profit was weak. The relevant question is whether its high-nickel and overseas customer edge remains durable.
weakness_summary: 2025 was under pressure because ternary demand slowed and product upgrade reduced shipments. LFP expansion may dilute differentiation if it becomes commodity capacity.
market_position_summary: 2025 reports say revenue was RMB 12.267bn; cathode-material revenue was RMB 11.734bn; shipments around 100kt; Korea Chungju ternary capacity was ramping; and high-nickel all-solid-state cathode materials achieved 10-ton-level shipments.
source_quality: Do you want 容百科技 retained as a high-nickel overseas-capacity option or rejected because 当升 and 华友 cover stronger cathode theses?
